title: Landing page renders hero and upload section
description: Open the homepage and verify the hero headline, primary CTAs, and upload card are visible.
steps: Verify headline 'Understand any product label in seconds' is visible
Verify CTA buttons 'Analyze Label' and 'See Results' are visible
Verify section heading 'Upload product label' is visible

title: Analyze endpoint rejects GET method
description: Verify API method restriction for /api/analyze using browser request.

title: OCR endpoint rejects GET method
description: Verify API method restriction for /api/ocr using browser request.

title: Header brand and nav links are visible
description: Validate top navigation structure and labels.
steps: Verify nav links 'Upload', 'Progress', and 'Results' are visible

title: Upload dropzone UI is visible
description: Ensure upload area and helper copy are visible in the upload card.
steps: Verify helper text 'or click to browse your files' is visible

title: Image URL input is visible and typed correctly
description: Verify URL field for alternate input path.
steps: Verify URL field with placeholder 'https://example.com/label.jpg' is visible

title: Run button starts disabled before input
description: Validate initial form safety state with no file and no URL.
steps: Verify 'Run Lablr' button is disabled on initial load

title: Progress section shows three pipeline steps
description: Confirm OCR, Analysis, and Explanation steps render in initial state.

title: Results section helper content is visible
description: Confirm results panel baseline guidance is rendered.
steps: Verify helper text about ingredient cards and risk badges is visible

title: Upload nav link jumps to upload section
description: Validate in-page anchor navigation for upload section.
steps: Verify viewport focuses section with id 'upload'

title: Progress nav link jumps to progress section
description: Validate in-page anchor navigation for progress section.
steps: Verify viewport focuses section with id 'progress'

title: Results nav link jumps to results section
description: Validate in-page anchor navigation for results section.
steps: Verify viewport focuses section with id 'results'

title: Static assets are served
description: Validate health of static assets required by the UI shell.
